format: id|location|price|type|beds|baths|sqft|description\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 8:\n                continue\n            prop = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'location': parts[1],\n                'price': int(parts[2]),\n                'type': parts[3],\n                'beds': int(parts[4]),\n                'baths': float(parts[5]),\n                'sqft': int(parts[6]),\n                'description': parts[7]\n            }\n            properties.append(prop)\n    return properties\n\ndef save_properties(properties):\n    with open(PROPERTIES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for p in properties:\n            line = '|'.join([str(p['id']), p['location'], str(p['price']), p['type'], str(p['beds']), str(p['baths']), str(p['sqft']), p['description']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_agents():\n    agents = []\n    with open(AGENTS_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: id|name|email|phone|specialization\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 5:\n                continue\n            agent = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'name': parts[1],\n                'email': parts[2],\n                'phone': parts[3],\n                'specialization': parts[4]\n            }\n            agents.append(agent)\n    return agents\n\ndef load_inquiries():\n    inquiries = []\n    with open(INQUIRIES_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|status|date\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 8:\n                continue\n            inquiry = {\n                'inquiry_id': parts[0],\n                'property_id': parts[1],\n                'customer_name': parts[2],\n                'customer_email': parts[3],\n                'customer_phone': parts[4],\n                'message': parts[5],\n                'status': parts[6],\n                'date': parts[7]\n            }\n            inquiries.append(inquiry)\n    return inquiries\n\ndef save_inquiries(inquiries):\n    with open(INQUIRIES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for inq in inquiries:\n            line = '|'.join([inq['inquiry_id'], inq['property_id'], inq['customer_name'], inq['customer_email'], inq['customer_phone'], inq['message'], inq['status'], inq['date']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_favorites():\n    favorites = []\n    if not os.path.exists(FAVORITES_FILE):\n        return favorites\n    with open(FAVORITES_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: favorite_id|user_id|property_id\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 3:\n                continue\n            favorite = {\n                'favorite_id': parts[0],\n                'user_id': parts[1],\n                'property_id': parts[2]\n            }\n            favorites.append(favorite)\n    return favorites\n\ndef save_favorites(favorites):\n    with open(FAVORITES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for fav in favorites:\n            line = '|'.join([fav['favorite_id'], fav['user_id'], fav['property_id']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_locations():\n    locations = []\n    with open(LOCATIONS_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: id|name|district|average_price|area|description\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 6:\n                continue\n            loc = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'name': parts[1],\n                'district': parts[2],\n                'average_price': int(parts[3]),\n                'area': parts[4],\n                'description': parts[5]\n            }\n            locations.append(loc)\n    return locations\n\n\n# Utility to generate new IDs for inquiries and favorites\nimport uuid\n\ndef generate_id():\n    return str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n\n# Flask Routes\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef home():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    properties = load_properties()\n    # Show featured properties (top 5 by price descending)\n    featured_properties = sorted(properties, key=lambda x: x['price'], reverse=True)[:5]\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_properties=featured_properties)\n\n@app.route('/search', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef search_page():\n    properties = load_properties()\n    locations = load_locations()\n    agents = load_agents()\n\n    filtered = properties\n\n    # Filters\n    location_filter = request.values.get('location')\n    min_price = request.values.get('price-range-min')\n    max_price = request.values.get('price-range-max')\n    property_type = request.values.get('property-type-filter')\n    beds_filter = request.values.get('beds')\n    baths_filter = request.values.get('baths')\n\n    if location_filter and location_filter != 'All':\n        filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['location'] == location_filter]\n    if min_price:\n        try:\n            min_p = int(min_price)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['price'] >= min_p]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if max_price:\n        try:\n            max_p = int(max_price)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['price'] <= max_p]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if property_type and property_type != 'All':\n        filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['type'] == property_type]\n    if beds_filter:\n        try:\n            bf = int(beds_filter)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['beds'] >= bf]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if baths_filter:\n        try:\n            bf = float(baths_filter)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['baths'] >= bf]\n        except:\n            pass\n\n    return render_template('search.html', properties=filtered, locations=locations, agents=agents)\n\n@app.route('/property/<property_id>')\ndef property_details(property_id):\n    properties = load_properties()\n    agents = load_agents()\n    property_item = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == property_id), None)\n    if not property_item:\n        return \"Property not found\", 404\n    # Find agents specializing in this property's type\n    related_agents = [a for a in agents if a['specialization'].lower() == property_item['type'].lower()]\n    return render_template('property_details.html', property=property_item, agents=related_agents)\n\n@app.route('/agents')\ndef agents_page():\n    agents = load_agents()\n    return render_template('agents.html', agents=agents)\n\n@app.route('/locations')\ndef locations_page():\n    locations = load_locations()\n    return render_template('locations.html', locations=locations)\n\n@app.route('/favorites')\ndef favorites_page():\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    properties = load_properties()\n\n    favorite_properties = []\n    for fav in favorites:\n        prop = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == fav['property_id']), None)\n        if prop:\n            favorite_properties.append({'favorite_id': fav['favorite_id'], 'property': prop})\n\n    return render_template('favorites.html', favorites=favorite_properties)\n\n@app.route('/inquiries')\ndef inquiries_page():\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    properties = load_properties()\n    # Join inquiry with property address for UI\n    for inq in inquiries:\n        prop = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == inq['property_id']), None)\n        inq['property_address'] = prop['location'] if prop else 'Unknown'\n    return render_template('inquiries.html', inquiries=inquiries)\n\n@app.route('/add-to-favorites/<property_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef add_to_favorites(property_id):\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    # Check if already in favorites (assuming user_id=1 for simplicity)\n    for fav in favorites:\n        if fav['property_id'] == property_id and fav['user_id'] == '1':\n            return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n    new_fav = {\n        'favorite_id': generate_id(),\n        'user_id': '1',\n        'property_id': property_id\n    }\n    favorites.append(new_fav)\n    save_favorites(favorites)\n    return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n\n@app.route('/remove-from-favorites/<favorite_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef remove_from_favorites(favorite_id):\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    favorites = [f for f in favorites if f['favorite_id'] != favorite_id]\n    save_favorites(favorites)\n    return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n\n@app.route('/submit-inquiry', methods=['POST'])\ndef submit_inquiry():\n    # Fields: property_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, message\n    property_id = request.form.get('select-property')\n    customer_name = request.form.get('inquiry-name')\n    customer_email = request.form.get('inquiry-email')\n    customer_phone = request.form.get('inquiry-phone')\n    message = request.form.get('inquiry-message')\n\n    if not all([property_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone]):\n        return \"Missing required fields\", 400\n\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    new_inquiry = {\n        'inquiry_id': generate_id(),\n        'property_id': property_id,\n        'customer_name': customer_name,\n        'customer_email': customer_email,\n        'customer_phone': customer_phone,\n        'message': message or '',\n        'status': 'Pending',\n        'date': ''  # Could be set to current date if needed\n    }\n    inquiries.append(new_inquiry)\n    save_inquiries(inquiries)\n    return redirect(url_for('inquiries_page'))\n\n@app.route('/delete-inquiry/<inquiry_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef delete_inquiry(inquiry_id):\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    inquiries = [inq for inq in inquiries if inq['inquiry_id'] != inquiry_id]\n    save_inquiries(inquiries)\n    return redirect(url_for('inquiries_page'))\n\n@app.route('/contact-agent/<agent_id>')\ndef contact_agent(agent_id):\n    agents = load_agents()\n    agent = next((a for a in agents if a['id'] == agent_id), None)\n    if not agent:\n        return \"Agent not found\", 404\n    # For simplicity, redirect to agents page highlighting the selected agent\n    return redirect(url_for('agents_page') + f'#agent-{agent_id}')\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})

  [design_spec.md] # RealEstate Web Application Design Specification  ## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation  ### 1. Dashboard Page - Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard - Elements:   - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.   - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.   - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.   - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.   - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.  ### 2. Property Search Page - Page Title: Property Search - Elements:   - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.   - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.   - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.   - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.   - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.   - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.   - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.  ### 3. Property Details Page - Page Title: Property Details - Elements:   - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.   - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.   - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.   - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.   - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.   - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.   - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.  ### 4. Property Inquiry Page - Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry - Elements:   - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.   - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.   - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.   - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.   - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.   - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.   - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.  ### 5. My Inquiries Page - Page Title: My Inquiries - Elements:   - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.   - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.   - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.   - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 6. My Favorites Page - Page Title: My Favorite Properties - Elements:   - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.   - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.   - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.   - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 7. Agent Directory Page - Page Title: Real Estate Agents - Elements:   - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.   - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.   - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.   - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 8. Locations Page - Page Title: Featured Locations - Elements:   - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.   - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.   - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.   - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.   ## Navigation Flows - Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites. - Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page. - From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set. - On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation. - My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard. - Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard. - Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.   ## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality  ### Search and Filter - Location input filters property list by location substring. - Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive. - Property type dropdown filters property type. - Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.  ### Property Details - Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features. - `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present. - `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.  ### Inquiry Submission - User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set. - User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits. - Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date. - After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.  ### Managing Inquiries - My Inquiries page shows all inquiries. - `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status. - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.  ### Managing Favorites - My Favorites page lists favorites. - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt. - `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.  ### Agents Interaction - Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match. - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.  ### Locations Interaction - `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion. - `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.   ## Section 3: Data Storage Model  All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.  ### 1. Properties Data - File: `properties.txt` - Fields:   - property_id   - address   - location   - price (numeric)   - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)   - bedrooms (numeric)   - bathrooms (numeric)   - square_feet (numeric)   - description   - agent_id   - status (Available, Sold, etc.) - Example:   ```   1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available   2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available   3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold   ```  ### 2. Locations Data - File: `locations.txt` - Fields:   - location_id   - location_name   - region   - average_price (numeric)   - property_count (numeric)   - description - Example:   ```   1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district   2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone   3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area   ```  ### 3. Property Inquiries Data - File: `inquiries.txt` - Fields:   - inquiry_id   - property_id   - customer_name   - customer_email   - customer_phone   - message   - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved) - Example:   ```   1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending   2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted   3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved   ```  ### 4. Favorite Properties Data - File: `favorites.txt` - Fields:   - favorite_id   - property_id   - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   ```   1|1|2025-01-10   2|2|2025-01-12   3|3|2025-01-14   ```  ### 5. Real Estate Agents Data - File: `agents.txt` - Fields:   - agent_id   - agent_name   - specialization   - email   - phone   - properties_sold (numeric) - Example:   ```   101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125   102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89   103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67   ```   --- This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.
================================================================================

=== design_spec.md ===
# RealEstate Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Elements:
  - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.
  - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.
  - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.
  - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.
  - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.

### 2. Property Search Page
- Page Title: Property Search
- Elements:
  - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.
  - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.
  - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.
  - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.
  - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.
  - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.

### 3. Property Details Page
- Page Title: Property Details
- Elements:
  - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.
  - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.
  - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.
  - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.
  - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.
  - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.

### 4. Property Inquiry Page
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.
  - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.
  - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.
  - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.
  - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.
  - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.

### 5. My Inquiries Page
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.
  - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.
  - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.
  - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 6. My Favorites Page
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Elements:
  - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.
  - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.
  - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 7. Agent Directory Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Elements:
  - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.
  - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.
  - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.
  - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 8. Locations Page
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Elements:
  - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.
  - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.
  - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.
  - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.


## Navigation Flows
- Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites.
- Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page.
- From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set.
- On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation.
- My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.


## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality

### Search and Filter
- Location input filters property list by location substring.
- Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive.
- Property type dropdown filters property type.
- Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.

### Property Details
- Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features.
- `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present.
- `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.

### Inquiry Submission
- User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set.
- User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits.
- Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date.
- After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.

### Managing Inquiries
- My Inquiries page shows all inquiries.
- `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status.
- `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.

### Managing Favorites
- My Favorites page lists favorites.
- `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt.
- `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.

### Agents Interaction
- Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match.
- `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.

### Locations Interaction
- `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion.
- `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.


## Section 3: Data Storage Model

All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.

### 1. Properties Data
- File: `properties.txt`
- Fields:
  - property_id
  - address
  - location
  - price (numeric)
  - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
  - bedrooms (numeric)
  - bathrooms (numeric)
  - square_feet (numeric)
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status (Available, Sold, etc.)
- Example:
  ```
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold
  ```

### 2. Locations Data
- File: `locations.txt`
- Fields:
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price (numeric)
  - property_count (numeric)
  - description
- Example:
  ```
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area
  ```

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File: `inquiries.txt`
- Fields:
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved
  ```

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File: `favorites.txt`
- Fields:
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14
  ```

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File: `agents.txt`
- Fields:
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold (numeric)
- Example:
  ```
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67
  ```


---
This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.

  [design_spec.md] # RealEstate Web Application Design Specification  ## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation  ### 1. Dashboard Page - Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard - Elements:   - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.   - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.   - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.   - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.   - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.  ### 2. Property Search Page - Page Title: Property Search - Elements:   - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.   - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.   - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.   - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.   - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.   - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.   - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.  ### 3. Property Details Page - Page Title: Property Details - Elements:   - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.   - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.   - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.   - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.   - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.   - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.   - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.  ### 4. Property Inquiry Page - Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry - Elements:   - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.   - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.   - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.   - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.   - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.   - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.   - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.  ### 5. My Inquiries Page - Page Title: My Inquiries - Elements:   - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.   - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.   - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.   - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 6. My Favorites Page - Page Title: My Favorite Properties - Elements:   - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.   - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.   - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.   - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 7. Agent Directory Page - Page Title: Real Estate Agents - Elements:   - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.   - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.   - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.   - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.  ### 8. Locations Page - Page Title: Featured Locations - Elements:   - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.   - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.   - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.   - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.   - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.   ## Navigation Flows - Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites. - Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page. - From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set. - On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation. - My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard. - Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard. - Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.   ## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality  ### Search and Filter - Location input filters property list by location substring. - Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive. - Property type dropdown filters property type. - Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.  ### Property Details - Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features. - `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present. - `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.  ### Inquiry Submission - User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set. - User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits. - Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date. - After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.  ### Managing Inquiries - My Inquiries page shows all inquiries. - `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status. - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.  ### Managing Favorites - My Favorites page lists favorites. - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt. - `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.  ### Agents Interaction - Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match. - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.  ### Locations Interaction - `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion. - `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.   ## Section 3: Data Storage Model  All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.  ### 1. Properties Data - File: `properties.txt` - Fields:   - property_id   - address   - location   - price (numeric)   - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)   - bedrooms (numeric)   - bathrooms (numeric)   - square_feet (numeric)   - description   - agent_id   - status (Available, Sold, etc.) - Example:   ```   1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available   2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available   3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold   ```  ### 2. Locations Data - File: `locations.txt` - Fields:   - location_id   - location_name   - region   - average_price (numeric)   - property_count (numeric)   - description - Example:   ```   1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district   2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone   3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area   ```  ### 3. Property Inquiries Data - File: `inquiries.txt` - Fields:   - inquiry_id   - property_id   - customer_name   - customer_email   - customer_phone   - message   - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved) - Example:   ```   1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending   2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted   3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved   ```  ### 4. Favorite Properties Data - File: `favorites.txt` - Fields:   - favorite_id   - property_id   - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   ```   1|1|2025-01-10   2|2|2025-01-12   3|3|2025-01-14   ```  ### 5. Real Estate Agents Data - File: `agents.txt` - Fields:   - agent_id   - agent_name   - specialization   - email   - phone   - properties_sold (numeric) - Example:   ```   101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125   102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89   103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67   ```   --- This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.
================================================================================

=== design_spec.md ===
# RealEstate Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Elements:
  - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.
  - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.
  - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.
  - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.
  - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.

### 2. Property Search Page
- Page Title: Property Search
- Elements:
  - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.
  - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.
  - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.
  - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.
  - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.
  - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.

### 3. Property Details Page
- Page Title: Property Details
- Elements:
  - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.
  - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.
  - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.
  - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.
  - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.
  - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.

### 4. Property Inquiry Page
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.
  - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.
  - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.
  - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.
  - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.
  - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.

### 5. My Inquiries Page
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.
  - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.
  - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.
  - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 6. My Favorites Page
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Elements:
  - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.
  - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.
  - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 7. Agent Directory Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Elements:
  - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.
  - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.
  - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.
  - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 8. Locations Page
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Elements:
  - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.
  - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.
  - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.
  - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.


## Navigation Flows
- Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites.
- Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page.
- From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set.
- On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation.
- My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.


## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality

### Search and Filter
- Location input filters property list by location substring.
- Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive.
- Property type dropdown filters property type.
- Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.

### Property Details
- Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features.
- `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present.
- `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.

### Inquiry Submission
- User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set.
- User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits.
- Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date.
- After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.

### Managing Inquiries
- My Inquiries page shows all inquiries.
- `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status.
- `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.

### Managing Favorites
- My Favorites page lists favorites.
- `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt.
- `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.

### Agents Interaction
- Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match.
- `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.

### Locations Interaction
- `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion.
- `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.


## Section 3: Data Storage Model

All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.

### 1. Properties Data
- File: `properties.txt`
- Fields:
  - property_id
  - address
  - location
  - price (numeric)
  - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
  - bedrooms (numeric)
  - bathrooms (numeric)
  - square_feet (numeric)
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status (Available, Sold, etc.)
- Example:
  ```
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold
  ```

### 2. Locations Data
- File: `locations.txt`
- Fields:
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price (numeric)
  - property_count (numeric)
  - description
- Example:
  ```
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area
  ```

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File: `inquiries.txt`
- Fields:
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved
  ```

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File: `favorites.txt`
- Fields:
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14
  ```

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File: `agents.txt`
- Fields:
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold (numeric)
- Example:
  ```
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67
  ```


---
This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.

=== design_spec.md ===
# RealEstate Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Elements:
  - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.
  - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.
  - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.
  - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.
  - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.

### 2. Property Search Page
- Page Title: Property Search
- Elements:
  - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.
  - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.
  - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.
  - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.
  - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.
  - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.

### 3. Property Details Page
- Page Title: Property Details
- Elements:
  - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.
  - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.
  - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.
  - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.
  - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.
  - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.

### 4. Property Inquiry Page
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.
  - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.
  - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.
  - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.
  - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.
  - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.

### 5. My Inquiries Page
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.
  - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.
  - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.
  - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 6. My Favorites Page
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Elements:
  - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.
  - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.
  - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 7. Agent Directory Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Elements:
  - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.
  - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.
  - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.
  - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 8. Locations Page
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Elements:
  - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.
  - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.
  - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.
  - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.


## Navigation Flows
- Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites.
- Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page.
- From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set.
- On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation.
- My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.


## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality

### Search and Filter
- Location input filters property list by location substring.
- Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive.
- Property type dropdown filters property type.
- Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.

### Property Details
- Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features.
- `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present.
- `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.

### Inquiry Submission
- User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set.
- User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits.
- Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date.
- After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.

### Managing Inquiries
- My Inquiries page shows all inquiries.
- `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status.
- `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.

### Managing Favorites
- My Favorites page lists favorites.
- `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt.
- `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.

### Agents Interaction
- Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match.
- `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.

### Locations Interaction
- `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion.
- `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.


## Section 3: Data Storage Model

All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.

### 1. Properties Data
- File: `properties.txt`
- Fields:
  - property_id
  - address
  - location
  - price (numeric)
  - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
  - bedrooms (numeric)
  - bathrooms (numeric)
  - square_feet (numeric)
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status (Available, Sold, etc.)
- Example:
  ```
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold
  ```

### 2. Locations Data
- File: `locations.txt`
- Fields:
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price (numeric)
  - property_count (numeric)
  - description
- Example:
  ```
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area
  ```

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File: `inquiries.txt`
- Fields:
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved
  ```

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File: `favorites.txt`
- Fields:
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14
  ```

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File: `agents.txt`
- Fields:
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold (numeric)
- Example:
  ```
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67
  ```


---
This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.

2. [02:33:34] TOOL_USE
   Tool: write_text_file({"filename":"app.py","content":"from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for\nimport os\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\n\n# Data file paths\nDATA_FOLDER = '.'\nPROPERTIES_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_FOLDER, 'properties.txt')\nAGENTS_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_FOLDER, 'agents.txt')\nINQUIRIES_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_FOLDER, 'inquiries.txt')\nFAVORITES_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_FOLDER, 'favorites.txt')\nLOCATIONS_FILE = os.path.join(DATA_FOLDER, 'locations.txt')\n\n# Helper functions to load and save data\n\ndef load_properties():\n    properties = []\n    with open(PROPERTIES_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: id|location|price|type|beds|baths|sqft|description\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 8:\n                continue\n            prop = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'location': parts[1],\n                'price': int(parts[2]),\n                'type': parts[3],\n                'beds': int(parts[4]),\n                'baths': float(parts[5]),\n                'sqft': int(parts[6]),\n                'description': parts[7]\n            }\n            properties.append(prop)\n    return properties\n\ndef save_properties(properties):\n    with open(PROPERTIES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for p in properties:\n            line = '|'.join([str(p['id']), p['location'], str(p['price']), p['type'], str(p['beds']), str(p['baths']), str(p['sqft']), p['description']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_agents():\n    agents = []\n    with open(AGENTS_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: id|name|email|phone|specialization\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 5:\n                continue\n            agent = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'name': parts[1],\n                'email': parts[2],\n                'phone': parts[3],\n                'specialization': parts[4]\n            }\n            agents.append(agent)\n    return agents\n\ndef load_inquiries():\n    inquiries = []\n    with open(INQUIRIES_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|status|date\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 8:\n                continue\n            inquiry = {\n                'inquiry_id': parts[0],\n                'property_id': parts[1],\n                'customer_name': parts[2],\n                'customer_email': parts[3],\n                'customer_phone': parts[4],\n                'message': parts[5],\n                'status': parts[6],\n                'date': parts[7]\n            }\n            inquiries.append(inquiry)\n    return inquiries\n\ndef save_inquiries(inquiries):\n    with open(INQUIRIES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for inq in inquiries:\n            line = '|'.join([inq['inquiry_id'], inq['property_id'], inq['customer_name'], inq['customer_email'], inq['customer_phone'], inq['message'], inq['status'], inq['date']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_favorites():\n    favorites = []\n    if not os.path.exists(FAVORITES_FILE):\n        return favorites\n    with open(FAVORITES_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: favorite_id|user_id|property_id\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 3:\n                continue\n            favorite = {\n                'favorite_id': parts[0],\n                'user_id': parts[1],\n                'property_id': parts[2]\n            }\n            favorites.append(favorite)\n    return favorites\n\ndef save_favorites(favorites):\n    with open(FAVORITES_FILE, 'w') as f:\n        for fav in favorites:\n            line = '|'.join([fav['favorite_id'], fav['user_id'], fav['property_id']])\n            f.write(line + '\\n')\n\ndef load_locations():\n    locations = []\n    with open(LOCATIONS_FILE, 'r') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            # format: id|name|district|average_price|area|description\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 6:\n                continue\n            loc = {\n                'id': parts[0],\n                'name': parts[1],\n                'district': parts[2],\n                'average_price': int(parts[3]),\n                'area': parts[4],\n                'description': parts[5]\n            }\n            locations.append(loc)\n    return locations\n\n\n# Utility to generate new IDs for inquiries and favorites\nimport uuid\n\ndef generate_id():\n    return str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n\n# Flask Routes\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef home():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    properties = load_properties()\n    # Show featured properties (top 5 by price descending)\n    featured_properties = sorted(properties, key=lambda x: x['price'], reverse=True)[:5]\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_properties=featured_properties)\n\n@app.route('/search', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef search_page():\n    properties = load_properties()\n    locations = load_locations()\n    agents = load_agents()\n\n    filtered = properties\n\n    # Filters\n    location_filter = request.values.get('location')\n    min_price = request.values.get('price-range-min')\n    max_price = request.values.get('price-range-max')\n    property_type = request.values.get('property-type-filter')\n    beds_filter = request.values.get('beds')\n    baths_filter = request.values.get('baths')\n\n    if location_filter and location_filter != 'All':\n        filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['location'] == location_filter]\n    if min_price:\n        try:\n            min_p = int(min_price)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['price'] >= min_p]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if max_price:\n        try:\n            max_p = int(max_price)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['price'] <= max_p]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if property_type and property_type != 'All':\n        filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['type'] == property_type]\n    if beds_filter:\n        try:\n            bf = int(beds_filter)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['beds'] >= bf]\n        except:\n            pass\n    if baths_filter:\n        try:\n            bf = float(baths_filter)\n            filtered = [p for p in filtered if p['baths'] >= bf]\n        except:\n            pass\n\n    return render_template('search.html', properties=filtered, locations=locations, agents=agents)\n\n@app.route('/property/<property_id>')\ndef property_details(property_id):\n    properties = load_properties()\n    agents = load_agents()\n    property_item = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == property_id), None)\n    if not property_item:\n        return \"Property not found\", 404\n    # Find agents specializing in this property's type\n    related_agents = [a for a in agents if a['specialization'].lower() == property_item['type'].lower()]\n    return render_template('property_details.html', property=property_item, agents=related_agents)\n\n@app.route('/agents')\ndef agents_page():\n    agents = load_agents()\n    return render_template('agents.html', agents=agents)\n\n@app.route('/locations')\ndef locations_page():\n    locations = load_locations()\n    return render_template('locations.html', locations=locations)\n\n@app.route('/favorites')\ndef favorites_page():\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    properties = load_properties()\n\n    favorite_properties = []\n    for fav in favorites:\n        prop = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == fav['property_id']), None)\n        if prop:\n            favorite_properties.append({'favorite_id': fav['favorite_id'], 'property': prop})\n\n    return render_template('favorites.html', favorites=favorite_properties)\n\n@app.route('/inquiries')\ndef inquiries_page():\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    properties = load_properties()\n    # Join inquiry with property address for UI\n    for inq in inquiries:\n        prop = next((p for p in properties if p['id'] == inq['property_id']), None)\n        inq['property_address'] = prop['location'] if prop else 'Unknown'\n    return render_template('inquiries.html', inquiries=inquiries)\n\n@app.route('/add-to-favorites/<property_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef add_to_favorites(property_id):\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    # Check if already in favorites (assuming user_id=1 for simplicity)\n    for fav in favorites:\n        if fav['property_id'] == property_id and fav['user_id'] == '1':\n            return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n    new_fav = {\n        'favorite_id': generate_id(),\n        'user_id': '1',\n        'property_id': property_id\n    }\n    favorites.append(new_fav)\n    save_favorites(favorites)\n    return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n\n@app.route('/remove-from-favorites/<favorite_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef remove_from_favorites(favorite_id):\n    favorites = load_favorites()\n    favorites = [f for f in favorites if f['favorite_id'] != favorite_id]\n    save_favorites(favorites)\n    return redirect(url_for('favorites_page'))\n\n@app.route('/submit-inquiry', methods=['POST'])\ndef submit_inquiry():\n    # Fields: property_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, message\n    property_id = request.form.get('select-property')\n    customer_name = request.form.get('inquiry-name')\n    customer_email = request.form.get('inquiry-email')\n    customer_phone = request.form.get('inquiry-phone')\n    message = request.form.get('inquiry-message')\n\n    if not all([property_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone]):\n        return \"Missing required fields\", 400\n\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    new_inquiry = {\n        'inquiry_id': generate_id(),\n        'property_id': property_id,\n        'customer_name': customer_name,\n        'customer_email': customer_email,\n        'customer_phone': customer_phone,\n        'message': message or '',\n        'status': 'Pending',\n        'date': ''  # Could be set to current date if needed\n    }\n    inquiries.append(new_inquiry)\n    save_inquiries(inquiries)\n    return redirect(url_for('inquiries_page'))\n\n@app.route('/delete-inquiry/<inquiry_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef delete_inquiry(inquiry_id):\n    inquiries = load_inquiries()\n    inquiries = [inq for inq in inquiries if inq['inquiry_id'] != inquiry_id]\n    save_inquiries(inquiries)\n    return redirect(url_for('inquiries_page'))\n\n@app.route('/contact-agent/<agent_id>')\ndef contact_agent(agent_id):\n    agents = load_agents()\n    agent = next((a for a in agents if a['id'] == agent_id), None)\n    if not agent:\n        return \"Agent not found\", 404\n    # For simplicity, redirect to agents page highlighting the selected agent\n    return redirect(url_for('agents_page') + f'#agent-{agent_id}')\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})

=== design_spec.md ===
# RealEstate Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: UI Pages and Navigation

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Elements:
  - ID: `dashboard-page` (Div) - Main container for dashboard content.
  - ID: `featured-properties` (Div) - Shows featured property recommendations with brief details.
  - ID: `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Search Page.
  - ID: `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Inquiries Page.
  - ID: `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigates to My Favorites Page.

### 2. Property Search Page
- Page Title: Property Search
- Elements:
  - ID: `search-page` (Div) - Container for search UI and results.
  - ID: `location-input` (Input) - Text field for user to enter location/city filter.
  - ID: `price-range-min` (Input number) - Input for minimum price filter.
  - ID: `price-range-max` (Input number) - Input for maximum price filter.
  - ID: `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select property type filter; options: House, Apartment, Condo, Land.
  - ID: `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid layout presenting property cards each showing image, location, price, beds/baths.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - On each property card, button to navigate to Property Details Page for that property.

### 3. Property Details Page
- Page Title: Property Details
- Elements:
  - ID: `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property full details.
  - ID: `property-address` (H1) - Shows the full address of the property.
  - ID: `property-price` (Div) - Shows the price prominently.
  - ID: `property-description` (Div) - Detailed textual description.
  - ID: `property-features` (Div) - Displays beds, baths, square footage.
  - ID: `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Adds the current property to favorites.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigates to Property Inquiry Page to submit inquiry for this property.

### 4. Property Inquiry Page
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form.
  - ID: `select-property` (Dropdown) - Dropdown to select the property for inquiry.
  - ID: `inquiry-name` (Input) - Input field for customer's name.
  - ID: `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Input field for customer's email.
  - ID: `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Input field for customer's phone number.
  - ID: `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Field to enter message.
  - ID: `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submits inquiry and saves data.

### 5. My Inquiries Page
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Elements:
  - ID: `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries list.
  - ID: `inquiries-table` (Table) - Displays list of inquiries showing property, date, status, contact info.
  - ID: `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Allows filtering inquiries by status: All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved.
  - ID pattern: `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) - Button to delete a specific inquiry.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 6. My Favorites Page
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Elements:
  - ID: `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorite properties.
  - ID: `favorites-list` (Div) - Displays all favorite properties with address, price.
  - ID pattern: `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Removes property from favorites.
  - ID pattern: `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) - Navigates to Property Details Page for the favorite property.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 7. Agent Directory Page
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Elements:
  - ID: `agents-page` (Div) - Container for the agents list.
  - ID: `agents-list` (Div) - Displays agents with photo, name, specialization, contacts.
  - ID: `agent-search` (Input) - Input for searching agents by name.
  - ID pattern: `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) - Button to contact the agent by opening an email link.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.

### 8. Locations Page
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Elements:
  - ID: `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations listings.
  - ID: `locations-list` (Div) - Lists locations with name, property count, average price.
  - ID pattern: `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) - Views properties listed in that location.
  - ID: `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price.
  - ID: `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Returns to Dashboard Page.


## Navigation Flows
- Dashboard buttons navigate to corresponding pages: Browse Properties -> Property Search, My Inquiries -> My Inquiries, My Favorites -> My Favorites.
- Property Search's property cards' `view-property-button-{property_id}` leads to Property Details Page.
- From Property Details Page, `submit-inquiry-button` navigates to Property Inquiry Page with selected property set.
- On inquiry submission via `submit-inquiry-button` on Inquiry Page, user is redirected to Dashboard Page after optional confirmation.
- My Inquiries and My Favorites pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Agent Directory and Locations Pages have back buttons returning to Dashboard.
- Favorites page's `view-property-button-{property_id}` and remove buttons allow property details viewing and favorite management.


## Section 2: User Interaction and Functionality

### Search and Filter
- Location input filters property list by location substring.
- Price range inputs filter by minimum and maximum price inclusive.
- Property type dropdown filters property type.
- Search filters dynamically update `properties-grid` contents.

### Property Details
- Selecting a property shows complete details with address, price, description, features.
- `add-to-favorites-button` appends property to favorites.txt if not already present.
- `submit-inquiry-button` leads to inquiry page with property pre-selected.

### Inquiry Submission
- User selects property from dropdown or it is pre-set.
- User fills name, email, phone, message, then submits.
- Submission creates new inquiry record in inquiries.txt with status 'Pending' and current date.
- After submission, user is redirected to Dashboard Page.

### Managing Inquiries
- My Inquiries page shows all inquiries.
- `inquiry-status-filter` filters inquiries by their status.
- `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` removes inquiry entry from inquiries.txt.

### Managing Favorites
- My Favorites page lists favorites.
- `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` removes property from favorites.txt.
- `view-property-button-{property_id}` navigates to Property Details page for the favorite property.

### Agents Interaction
- Agent Search input filters agents-list by name substring match.
- `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` opens the user's default email client with the agent's email address.

### Locations Interaction
- `location-sort` dropdown sorts locations-list by selected criterion.
- `view-location-button-{location_id}` filters or navigates to a list of properties for that location.


## Section 3: Data Storage Model

All data is stored in the "data" directory in text files with pipe `|` separated fields.

### 1. Properties Data
- File: `properties.txt`
- Fields:
  - property_id
  - address
  - location
  - price (numeric)
  - property_type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
  - bedrooms (numeric)
  - bathrooms (numeric)
  - square_feet (numeric)
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status (Available, Sold, etc.)
- Example:
  ```
  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold
  ```

### 2. Locations Data
- File: `locations.txt`
- Fields:
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price (numeric)
  - property_count (numeric)
  - description
- Example:
  ```
  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area
  ```

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File: `inquiries.txt`
- Fields:
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - status (Pending, Contacted, Resolved)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved
  ```

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File: `favorites.txt`
- Fields:
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  ```
  1|1|2025-01-10
  2|2|2025-01-12
  3|3|2025-01-14
  ```

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File: `agents.txt`
- Fields:
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold (numeric)
- Example:
  ```
  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67
  ```


---
This design specification fully describes the UI, navigation, user interaction, and data storage model for the RealEstate web application as required.
